conflict: Recurring shin pain and acute money pressure make withdrawal feel like betrayal of family survival.
consequence: Anika retires on medical advice; sponsor money disappears, but Ravi publicly supports the decision, permanently shifting their power dynamic.
must_land_beats: High-quality opening games suggest breakthrough is possible.
Pain recurrence forces immediate risk calculation.
Medical timeout confirms danger of continuation.
Ravi answers sponsor representative without undermining Anika.
objective: Advance through the invitational semifinal and secure sponsor-backed academy funding.
